# aer_simulartor_statevector

## statevector

兼容选项如下：

````{text}
save_statevector:
    automatic
    statevector
    matrix_product_state
    extended_stabilizer
````

````{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit, transpile
import numpy as np
from qiskit_aer import AerSimulator
from qiskit.visualization import plot_bloch_multivector, plot_state_qsphere

# save statevector
qc = QuantumCircuit(2, 2)
qc.ry(np.pi/4, 0)
qc.save_statevector() 

# get_statevector
# use backend to calcualte and statistics 
sim = AerSimulator(
    method="statevector",
    device="CPU",      # 有 GPU 版 Aer 时可以改成 "GPU"
    precision="single",
)
tqc = transpile(qc, sim)
job = sim.run(
    tqc,
)
vec_result = job.result()
psi = vec_result.get_statevector()  # get the statevector in matrix form 
print(psi)
plot_bloch_multivector(psi).show() # plot vector and qsphere.
plot_state_qsphere(psi).show()
````

## uniary 

兼容选项如下：

````{text}
save_unitary:
    automatic
    unitary
````

```{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit, transpile
import numpy as np
from qiskit_aer import AerSimulator
from qiskit.visualization import plot_bloch_multivector, plot_state_qsphere
# save_unitary
qc = QuantumCircuit(2, 2)
qc.ry(np.pi/4, 0)
qc.save_unitary() 

# get_unitary
sim = AerSimulator(
    method="unitary",
    device="CPU",      # 有 GPU 版 Aer 时可以改成 "GPU"
    precision="single",
)
tqc = transpile(qc, sim)
job = sim.run(
    tqc,
)
matrix_result = job.result()
matrix = matrix_result.get_unitary()  # get the statevector in matrix form 
print(matrix)
```

## others

支持直接get的就那么多：

````{python}
[m for m in dir(vec_result) if m.startswith("get_")]
````

其他的只能保存为label提取:

````{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit, transpile
import numpy as np
from qiskit_aer import AerSimulator

# save
qc = QuantumCircuit(2, 2)
qc.ry(np.pi/4, 0)
qc.save_statevector() 
qc.save_density_matrix(label="rho")
qc.save_probabilities(label="probs")
qc.save_matrix_product_state(label="prod_psi")
# qc.save_expectation_value(op, qubits=[0, 1], label="expval")

# get
sim = AerSimulator(
    method="matrix_product_state",
    device="CPU",      # 有 GPU 版 Aer 时可以改成 "GPU"
    precision="single",
)
tqc = transpile(qc, sim)
result = sim.run(tqc).result()
data = result.data(0)
rho = data["rho"]
probs = data["probs"]
prod_psi = data["prod_psi"]
#expval = data["expval"]
````
